Here's what I found and fixed:

**Root cause:** The timeline link was correctly added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/sitenav.js` (line 12). The problem was Cloudflare caching. All HTML files referenced `sitenav.js?v=nav-fixed` -- this query param hadn't changed when the timeline link was added to sitenav.js, so Cloudflare continued serving its cached copy of the old file (without the timeline link).

**Fix:** Updated the cache-bust parameter from `?v=nav-fixed` to `?v=d004dbf` (the commit hash of the...(truncated)
